issue_summary: Cut over to consistent default values and added support for entire long range
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Finds the largest ord whose value is less or equal to the requested
     * value. If {@link LookupResult#found} is true, then ord is an exact match.
     * The returned {@link LookupResult} may be reused across calls.
     */
javadoc_after: /** * Finds the ordinal whose value is greater or equal to the given value. * * @return the given values ordinal if found or otherwise * (-(ord)-1), defined as the ordinal of the first * element that is greater than the given value. This guarantees * that the return value will always be >= 0 if the given value * is found. * */
